title: PDF Viewer column viewport fit (dbg74)
description:
PipeSync PDF Viewer fit width now uses the viewer column viewport (body minus library and scrollbar gutter) as the primary width source, not scroll.clientWidth alone. Scroll container width is set to the column viewport while zoomport keeps scaled content width; a post-fit overflow clamp ensures scaled content never exceeds scroll client width.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg74). Open PDF Viewer: the right edge of pages should be fully visible without Ctrl+drag horizontal pan.
changeLog: planBoardViewerColumnViewportWidth: body minus library and scrollbar reserve.
Fit avail width primary source is column viewport, not scroll.clientWidth.
Zoom from max(fitContentW, worldBounds.w); post-fit overflow clamp once.
Scroll chrome width = column viewport; zoomport stays lw*z.
H8 ingest: columnViewportW, scaledContentW, overflow clamp flag.
